visual_description: A person in dark, tactical clothing stands in a dimly lit room with checkered flooring, holding a firearm and looking toward the right. Another person is partially visible on the right edge of the frame, while a third figure can be seen in the background doorway. The person in the foreground has a hood up, their face partially obscured, and they are in a cautious, alert stance with their body slightly turned.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a low pitch and moderate pace, accompanied by heavy breathing and a gasp.
